_comment: Scope: server logic (mimir) + the Asgard state machines (pure reducers/flows). Excludes the same glue the coverage gate excludes (vitest.config.ts) — channel.ts (Bun.serve + MCP wiring), the argv-routing entry main.ts and its IO glue launcher.ts / runBuild.ts (Bun.spawn of claude + git, lsof, fetch), and diff.ts (gh subprocess shellouts) have no unit harness, and the bun:sqlite stores (*.sqlite.ts) + their bun-only specs (*.buntest.ts) can't be imported under the vitest runner, so mutating any of them only yields no-coverage noise. The React components are exercised by the 100%-gated jsdom suite + the Playwright E2E; mutation testing earns the most on the branchy decision logic. break is set below the measured baseline so the gate fails only on regressions; ratchet it up as survivors are killed.
